episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 519: Goblins on the Horizon
episode.description:
Cliff and James pull you into all the hottest Magic the Gathering card price action of the week, including meta updates, cards to watch and some thoughts on the forthcoming Secret Lair Goblin deck. 

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
